change.description: Add a retained-bench/native runtime diagnostic that bypasses automatic rowchunk batch-GEMV O repair, then test c8 rowchunk2 native-O vs the batch-GEMV control.

blockers: full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path
full-attention O projection forced to batch GEMV for multi-row chunks
finding_table.label: c8_rowchunk2_batch_gemv_control

blockers: full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path
full-attention O projection forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path
finding_table.label: c8_rowchunk2_native_o

findings: The c8 rowchunk2 batch/default control remains generated-token green at [137]*8 and records first full-attention layer output path native_batch_with_row_chunk_batch_gemv.
Forcing native rowchunk O projection under the same c8 rowchunk2 schedule is red: prefixes [137,137,137,118,45,137,68,137].

Therefore rowchunk2 grouping alone is not sufficient for retained c8 correctness; the automatic batch-GEMV O projection repair remains an independent required c8 correctness component until native rowchunk O is fixed.

guard.command: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json

prompt_verifier.evidence: Pass: the iteration adds and exercises a targeted native rowchunk-O diagnostic. The batch-GEMV O path is green while native rowchunk O is red under identical c8 rowchunk2 grouping, eliminating row grouping as sufficient and narrowing retained c8 correctness to the O projection repair. No throughput claim.

blockers: full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path
full-attention O projection forced to batch GEMV for multi-row chunks
c8_rowchunk2_batch_gemv_control.command: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --fixture /tmp/hipengine-prebench/fixtures/qwen36_paro_8x512_prompt_ids.json --prompt-length 512 --batch-size 8 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --batch-decode-full-attn-path native_batch --batch-decode-full-attn-row-chunk-size 2 --batch-decode-moe-path grouped_compact --batch-decode-linear-output-path batch_gemv --batch-sample-mode serial_lm_head --batch-decode-full-attn-output-path batch --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-retained/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json benchmarks/results/2026-06-04-hipengine-qwen35-retained-c8-rowchunk2-native-o-frontier-253/c8_rowchunk2_batch_gemv_control.json
c8_rowchunk2_batch_gemv_control.label: c8_rowchunk2_batch_gemv_control

blockers: full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path
full-attention O projection forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path
c8_rowchunk2_native_o.command: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --fixture /tmp/hipengine-prebench/fixtures/qwen36_paro_8x512_prompt_ids.json --prompt-length 512 --batch-size 8 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --batch-decode-full-attn-path native_batch --batch-decode-full-attn-row-chunk-size 2 --batch-decode-moe-path grouped_compact --batch-decode-linear-output-path batch_gemv --batch-sample-mode serial_lm_head --batch-decode-full-attn-output-path native_row_chunk --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-retained/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json benchmarks/results/2026-06-04-hipengine-qwen35-retained-c8-rowchunk2-native-o-frontier-253/c8_rowchunk2_native_o.json
c8_rowchunk2_native_o.label: c8_rowchunk2_native_o
